reviews.review_description: Low-key one of the best exercise apps on Meta.  Particularly for head-training.  If you're into VR boxercise, I recommend adding this little beauty to your routine for sure.  It may be barebones, but it gets the job done.  Great work! :)

developer_response.body: Thank you! Your review is very encouraging!

reviews.review_description: I mean the title looks like it would be dog water. But it's actually SUPER good and fun. I mean you get bored after like 30 minutes, but if your playing it, and your friends playing it, it's SUPERR fun. Definitely recommend for new and any Oculus player.

developer_response.body: Thank you! Your review is very encouraging!
